nodes.label: Configuration loading and validation for Ouroboros.
Ouroboros: Self-improving agent engine for claw-code.
Telemetry record dataclass for iteration archive.
Outcome of a single improvement iteration attempt.
A scored dimension with name and normalized value between 0.0 and 1.0.
Validate that value is between 0.0 and 1.0.
A snapshot of all dimension scores at a specific iteration.
Return the DimensionScore for the named dimension, or None if not found.
Serialize this snapshot to a JSON-compatible dict.
A single recorded event from an agent run for trace analysis.
Return the markdown body (cognitive traces, diff, traceback).
Report produced by the Observer agent identifying the weakest dimension.
A single file modification specified in a change plan.
A complete plan produced by the Strategist agent with hypothesis and file change
A permanent record of a single improvement iteration attempt and its outcome.
Build and return the argument parser for the ouroboros CLI.
Parse arguments and dispatch to the appropriate subcommand handler.
Execute the main improvement loop with optional overrides.
Display the current scoreboard or its history over time.
Display ledger entries with optional filtering by iteration or outcome.
Run the meta-learning loop or display prompt version status.
Run the specified benchmark suite and display results.
Show current configuration or update a configuration value.
Launch the terminal or web dashboard for viewing system status.
Core improvement loop — OBSERVE → HYPOTHESIZE → IMPLEMENT → EVALUATE.
Run the improvement loop for up to max_iterations.
Execute one full OBSERVE → HYPOTHESIZE → IMPLEMENT → EVALUATE cycle.
Run all benchmark dimensions against a target path. Override in tests.
Get test names that passed in the most recent merged iteration.
Read relevant source files based on the dimension being targeted.
Compute the net improvement score (sum of dimension deltas).
Read accumulated tokens from an agent wrapper. Returns (in, out, cost).
Write a telemetry record for this iteration.
Persistent trace storage in JSONL format.
Trace analysis — pattern detection across runs.
Produce aggregate statistics from trace events.
Collect trace events from claw-code CLI runs.
Versioned prompt storage with atomic symlink swaps.
Manage versioned prompt files for each agent.
Write v1.md and current.md for each agent from defaults (first run).
Load the current prompt for an agent. Falls back to hardcoded default.
Return the highest version number for an agent.
Write a new prompt version file. Returns the version number.
Promote a version to current via atomic file swap.
Count tokens (words) in a prompt version.
Benchmark task definitions and rotating task generation.
A single benchmark task for tournament evaluation.
Load benchmark tasks from YAML files in a directory.
Generate rotating benchmark tasks from the current codebase.
Find undocumented public functions and generate add-docstring tasks.
Meta-Agent — outer loop that evolves agent prompts.
Check if mutation exceeds the bloat limit.
Outer loop that evolves agent prompts based on telemetry.
Run one meta-cycle. Returns the result.
Select the agent that causes the most failures based on telemetry.
Tournament runner — evaluate prompts against benchmark tasks.
Score a single task result using AST-based deterministic checks.      Returns 1.
Check if code has zero ruff violations.
Check if the target function has a docstring using AST.
Check if target function has low complexity by counting branches.
Run benchmark tasks against a prompt and compute aggregate score.
Run all tasks and return mean score.          agent_callable: a function(task_de
Observer agent — reads traces and scoreboard to identify weaknesses.
Analyze scoreboard and traces, return an ObservationReport.
Implementer agent — writes code changes in a sandboxed worktree.
Write code changes to the worktree based on the plan.
Validate Python files for syntax errors. Returns error message or empty string.
Strategist agent — proposes hypotheses and change plans.
Propose a change plan based on the observation.
Evaluator agent — runs scoreboard and makes merge/rollback decisions.
Compare before/after scoreboard snapshots and decide merge or rollback.
Base agent class with LLM call wrapper.
Call the LLM with system and user prompts.
Call LLM and parse JSON response, retrying once on failure.
Parse JSON from LLM response, handling markdown fences and truncation.
Calculate USD cost from token counts and model name.
Record a call's token usage. Returns the cost of this call.
Efficiency benchmark dimension — token usage compared to baseline.
Measure efficiency as the ratio of baseline tokens to current tokens.      The s
Initialize the scorer.          Args:             baseline_tokens: Reference tok
Score = baseline / current, capped at 1.0. Lower tokens = higher score.
Check if the after snapshot passes the merge gate relative to before.
Convenience function for merge gate check.
Run all 6 scoreboard dimensions against a target path.      Args:         target
Run tests and parse results. Returns (test_results, approximate_token_count).
Regression benchmark dimension — previously-passing tasks still pass.
Scores regression as the fraction of previously-passing tasks that still pass.
Score = fraction of previously-passing tasks still passing.          Parameters
Correctness benchmark dimension — task pass/fail rate.
Scores correctness as the fraction of tasks that pass.      A pass/fail dict wit
Score based on pass/fail results. Empty results = 0.0.
Resolve tool binary, preferring venv over system PATH.
Run static analysis and compute a composite quality score.
Return human-readable ruff violations and complexity info.
Score based on lint violations. 0 violations = 1.0.
Score based on cyclomatic complexity. Average CC < 5 = 1.0.
Real-world benchmark dimension — docstring coverage as code quality proxy.
Score based on docstring coverage of public functions/classes/methods.
Score = fraction of public callables that have docstrings.
Pre-merge safety invariants — kill switch before the merge gate.
Check safety invariants before the merge gate runs.
Run all invariant checks. Returns first violation found, or passed.
Safe rollback — clean up worktree and branch, never crash.
Attempt to remove a worktree and its branch. Never raises.
Git worktree management for isolated improvement attempts.
Sandboxed command execution with allowlist enforcement.
Persistent append-only record of every improvement iteration.
Initialize the ledger with a base directory for storage.
Append an iteration record to the ledger.
Get the highest iteration number, or 0 if empty.
Serialize a LedgerEntry to a JSON-compatible dict.
Serialize a ScoreboardSnapshot to a dict.
Deserialize a dict to a LedgerEntry.
Deserialize a dict to a ScoreboardSnapshot.
Terminal dashboard for scoreboard and ledger visualization.
Render a scoreboard snapshot as an ASCII bar chart.
Render a compact summary of ledger entries.
Complete record of a single inner-loop iteration.
Return flat dict suitable for YAML frontmatter.
Telemetry reader — query interface over the archive index.
Read and query telemetry records from the archive.
Return lowest-scoring iterations, sorted by eval_score ascending.
All iterations that used a specific prompt version for the given agent.
Win rate and counts per implementer prompt version.
Read the full markdown body of a specific record.
Append-only telemetry writer — serializes records to markdown + index.
Write telemetry records to .ouroboros/archive/ as markdown files.
Serialize a TelemetryRecord to markdown and append to index.
Create a directory with clean Python code.
Create a directory with messy Python code.
Verify complexity averaging includes all functions, not just C+ grade.
Tests for the full scoreboard runner (all 6 dimensions).
Create a minimal Python project with a test.
_run_tests must invoke the provided test_command, not a hardcoded one.
When a real test file exists and passes, correctness > 0.
Files with syntax errors should not be committed.
Valid Python files should pass validation.
Tests for benchmark task loading and rotating task generation.
Tests for BaseAgent JSON parsing and retry logic.
End-to-end integration test — runs a single iteration with mocked LLM calls.
Create a minimal repo with claw-code-like structure.
Files matching blocked_paths should not appear in source context.
Tests for PromptStore — versioned prompt files with atomic swap.
